attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SXSHAR.SAF_ID BK_SAF_ID_INT,  
EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,       
EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE  BK_COMPANY_CD,  
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD , 
COALESCE(SXSHAR.SAF_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS  SAF_TYPE_CD,         
SXSHAR.SAF_REASON   ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD,        
SXSHAR.SAF_REASON  ADJUSTMENT_REASON_TXT  ,      
-999 AS BK_APPROVER_PARTY_KEY,         
-999 AS BK_REQUESTOR_PARTY_KEY,        
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,               
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCAC_SAF_HDR_ALL_REV SXSHAR
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	ON(SXSHAR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SXSHAR.GLOBAL_NAME)

UNION ALL

SELECT
EXSHAR.SAF_ID BK_SAF_ID_INT,  
EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,       
EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE  BK_COMPANY_CD,  
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CD , 
COALESCE(EXSHAR.SAF_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS  SAF_TYPE_CD,         
EXSHAR.SAF_REASON   ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD,        
EXSHAR.SAF_REASON  ADJUSTMENT_REASON_TXT  ,      
-999 AS BK_APPROVER_PARTY_KEY,   
-999 AS BK_REQUESTOR_PARTY_KEY,             
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,               
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXCAC_SAF_HDR_ALL_REV EXSHAR
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
	ON(EXSHAR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
	ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EXSHAR.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT BATCH_ID                    
,ALERT_STATUS                
,CASH_RECEIPT_ID             
,COLLECTOR_ID                
,COMMENTS                    
,CREATED_BY                  
,CREATION_DATE               
,EMAIL_ADDRESS               
,EXCHANGE_DATE               
,EXCHANGE_RATE               
,EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE          
,FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE          
,FUNC_SAF_AMOUNT             
,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,INITIATOR_GROUP_ID            
,INITIATOR_ROLE_ID             
,ITEM_KEY                      
,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
,ORG_ID                        
,SAF_AMOUNT                    
,SAF_DATE                      
,SAF_HEADER_ID                 
,SAF_ID                        
,SAF_REASON                    
,SAF_STATUS                    
,SAF_TYPE                      
,SPECIAL_REQUEST               
,TRAN_CURRENCY_CODE            
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,ACTION_CODE                  
,'RI' AS  EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCAC_SAF_HDR_ALL_REV SXSHAR
 WHERE NOT EXISTS 
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SXSHAR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  OR NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
 WHERE SXSHAR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)

SELECT SXSHAR.BATCH_ID,SXSHAR.SAF_HEADER_ID,SXSHAR.SAF_ID,SXSHAR.SAF_TYPE,SXSHAR.SAF_REASON,SXSHAR.SAF_DATE,SXSHAR.SAF_STATUS,
SXSHAR.SAF_AMOUNT,SXSHAR.SPECIAL_REQUEST,SXSHAR.EMAIL_ADDRESS,SXSHAR.INITIATOR_ROLE_ID,SXSHAR.INITIATOR_GROUP_ID,SXSHAR.COLLECTOR_ID,
SXSHAR.COMMENTS,SXSHAR.ITEM_KEY,SXSHAR.CASH_RECEIPT_ID,SXSHAR.ALERT_STATUS,SXSHAR.ORG_ID,SXSHAR.FUNC_SAF_AMOUNT,SXSHAR.FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
SXSHAR.TRAN_CURRENCY_CODE,SXSHAR.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,SXSHAR.EXCHANGE_RATE,SXSHAR.EXCHANGE_DATE,SXSHAR.CREATED_BY,SXSHAR.CREATION_DATE,
SXSHAR.LAST_UPDATED_BY,SXSHAR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,SXSHAR.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,SXSHAR.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,SXSHAR.GLOBAL_NAME,
SXSHAR.CREATE_DATETIME,SXSHAR.ACTION_CODE,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
SXSHAR.N_ATTRIBUTE1,
SXSHAR.D_ATTRIBUTE2                  
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_REV SXSHAR
 WHERE NOT EXISTS 
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
 WHERE NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SXSHAR.GLOBAL_NAME)
  OR NOT EXISTS
 (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
 WHERE SXSHAR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)

SELECT
 COALESCE(SXSHAR.SAF_ID , -999) AS  BK_SAF_ID_INT,
 COALESCE(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, -999)  SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,       
 COALESCE(EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE,'UNK')  BK_COMPANY_CD,  
 COALESCE(NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,'UNK') SS_CD , 
 COALESCE(SXSHAR.SAF_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS  SAF_TYPE_CD,         
 COALESCE(SXSHAR.SAF_REASON, 'UNKNOWN') AS    ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD,        
 COALESCE(SXSHAR.SAF_REASON,'UNKNOWN') AS   ADJUSTMENT_REASON_TXT  ,      
 -999 AS BK_APPROVER_PARTY_KEY,         
 -999 AS BK_REQUESTOR_PARTY_KEY, 
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,               
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 COALESCE(SXSHAR.N_ATTRIBUTE1, -999) AS PENDING_APPROVER_CNT, 
 COALESCE( SXSHAR.D_ATTRIBUTE2, CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS ESTIMATED_SAF_APPROVAL_DT,
 -999 AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 COALESCE( SXSHAR.CREATE_DATETIME  , CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
 COALESCE( CAST( SXSHAR.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE ) ,  
 CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) ) DV_SOURCE_CREATED_DT,
 COALESCE(SXSHAR.SAF_STATUS, 'UNKNOWN') as BK_SALES_ADJ_FORM_STATUS_CD,
 COALESCE(SXSHAR.SAF_AMOUNT,0.0000000 ) AS SAF_USD_AMT,
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
 '=' AS DML_TYPE
 FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_REV SXSHAR
 INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
  ON(SXSHAR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SXSHAR.GLOBAL_NAME)
 WHERE SXSHAR.D_ATTRIBUTE2 IS NOT NULL  
 AND SXSHAR.N_ATTRIBUTE1 IS NOT NULL /*ADDING CONDITIONS HERE AS THEY ARE COMMENTED IN NRTACCUM LAYER*/
 
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT
 COALESCE(EXSHAR.SAF_ID, -999) AS BK_SAF_ID_INT,  
 COALESCE(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, -999)   SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,       
 COALESCE(EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE,'UNK')   BK_COMPANY_CD,  
 COALESCE(NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,'UNK') SS_CD , 
 COALESCE(EXSHAR.SAF_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS  SAF_TYPE_CD,         
 COALESCE(EXSHAR.SAF_REASON, 'UNKNOWN') AS    ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CD,        
 COALESCE(EXSHAR.SAF_REASON,'UNKNOWN') AS  ADJUSTMENT_REASON_TXT  ,      
 -999 AS BK_APPROVER_PARTY_KEY,         
 -999 AS BK_REQUESTOR_PARTY_KEY,  
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,               
 USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 COALESCE(EXSHAR.N_ATTRIBUTE1, -999) AS  PENDING_APPROVER_CNT, 
 COALESCE( EXSHAR.D_ATTRIBUTE2, CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS  ESTIMATED_SAF_APPROVAL_DT,
 -999 AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 COALESCE(EXSHAR.CREATE_DATETIME,CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS  SOURCE_CREATED_DTM,
 COALESCE( CAST( EXSHAR.CREATE_DATETIME AS DATE ) ,  CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) ) DV_SOURCE_CREATED_DT,
 COALESCE(EXSHAR.SAF_STATUS, 'UNKNOWN') as  BK_SALES_ADJ_FORM_STATUS_CD,
 COALESCE(EXSHAR.SAF_AMOUNT,0.0000000 )  AS SAF_USD_AMT,
 'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
 '=' AS DML_TYPE
 FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_XXICM_SAF_HEADERS_REV EXSHAR
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC
  ON(EXSHAR.ORG_ID = EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
  ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EXSHAR.GLOBAL_NAME)    
 WHERE EXSHAR.D_ATTRIBUTE2 IS NOT NULL  
 AND EXSHAR.N_ATTRIBUTE1 IS NOT NULL
